data.name: Hentai Tales: Slave App - Arrogant Sisters
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在解開棘手謎題的同時享受官能滿點的故事！
依照數字順序連接棋盤上的所有方格
完成謎題即可解鎖全新情慾畫面並推進劇情！
你能解開所有謎題並攻略全部的女孩嗎？！

故事背景

手機突然出現了名為「無感日常」的神祕應用程式──這正是我展開復仇的殘酷利器
現在，獵食者將淪為獵物。我要讓那對高傲的姊妹...徹底明白她們該在的位置

角色介紹

赤切凜花：

性情火爆的惡劣辣妹，憑藉美貌與暴力支配校園。短裙與敞開的制服刻意展露曲線
如今她的軀體將淪為我掌中玩物，而她對此甚至渾然不覺

赤切烈月：

凜花的姐姐，高不可攀的學生會長。冰冷優雅的姿態受到眾人仰慕
但完美面具下的真相是──當尊嚴遭剝奪時，這座冰雕會發出淫靡的嬌喘。而拜應用程式所賜，她的臣服將公諸於世

遊戲特色

  • 收錄20張美少女香艷誘惑的插畫
  • 多名獨具個性的少女交織的奇幻情色劇
  • 可跳過謎題直接享受劇情 (進行謎題時按下Enter鍵)
  • CG鑑賞模式 (解開謎題後點擊CG畫面左右的箭頭)

*具備完整音效支援的語言

  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Slave App - Arrogant Sisters
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

The app appeared on my phone. 'Ordinary & Unfeeling.' A twisted power to make them blind to my revenge.
Now? The predator becomes the prey. And these arrogant sisters… will learn their place."

Characters

Akagiri Rinka:

Fiery-tempered and vulgar, Rinka rules the school with her looks and cruelty. Her short skirt and unbuttoned uniform flaunt her curves, but no one dares call her out—except me.
Now, her body’s my plaything, and she won’t even realize it.

Akagiri Retsuki:

Rinka’s older sister, the untouchable student council president. Cold, elegant, and admired by all.
But her perfect facade hides a secret—when stripped of her dignity, she moans. And thanks to the app, her submission will be public.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
